name: Maskscar Plaza District
identity: Public ceremonial district where masks, banners, dance terraces, and civic braziers keep renewal visible in urban life.
approach: Wide plazas, mosaic routes, and workshop facades show a settlement designed for processional movement.
inside: Mask workshops, banner halls, and rehearsal terraces make ceremony a labor system as well as a public identity.
who_is_out_of_place: those seeking private control of public observance
expected_behavior: treat banners and masks as dynastic civic property
faith: explicitly civic, seasonal, dynastic, and ceremonial rather than temple-centered
seasonal_change: Midyear observance turns the district into the loudest civic space in Psanan.
